filters.zone_map_layout: [uint32_t num_blocks=600][int32_t min, int32_t max per block]
filters.interior_block_optimization: blocks where block_min >= 8766 AND block_max < 9131 skip per-row date check

filters.zone_map_layout: [uint32_t num_blocks=600][double min, double max per block]
filters.note: applied only to date-qualifying candidate blocks; limited pruning power (discount not sorted)

filters.zone_map_layout: [uint32_t num_blocks=600][double min, double max per block]

phase1_block_selection.first_block: binary search for first b where block_max[b] >= 8766
phase1_block_selection.last_block: binary search for last b where block_min[b] < 9131

phase2_secondary_zone_map_prune.order: discount_zonemap then quantity_zonemap per candidate block

phase3_per_row_fused_filter.predicate_mask: (shipdate_in_range OR interior_block) AND discount_in_range AND quantity_lt_24

data_structures.zone_map_shipdate: mmap int32_t zone map, binary search for block range
data_structures.zone_map_discount: mmap double zone map, block-level skip for candidate blocks
data_structures.zone_map_quantity: mmap double zone map, block-level skip for candidate blocks

aggregation.reduction: final_sum = sum of all thread-local sums (64 values)

parallelism.sync: OpenMP reduction(+:revenue) or manual thread-local array reduce
parallelism.load_balance: dynamic block dispatch over ~94 candidate blocks

indexes.layout: uint32_t num_blocks, then int32_t[num_blocks] min, int32_t[num_blocks] max
uint32_t num_blocks, then double[num_blocks] min, double[num_blocks] max
uint32_t num_blocks, then double[num_blocks] min, double[num_blocks] max

mmap_strategy.zone_maps: mmap all three zone map files upfront (tiny, <50KB each)
mmap_strategy.column_data: mmap all four columns; use zone-map-guided madvise WILLNEED only on qualifying block byte ranges (P13)
